label: Telemetry Pipeline
info:
Subscribes to iot/# on Mosquitto, parses measurement topics, and writes to InfluxDB.
Lifecycle topics (status, events, commands) are silently dropped.
Malformed messages are caught and logged to the debug panel.

name: Parse Topic & Validate
Build InfluxDB Point

label: Email Alerts
info:
Flow A: Twice-daily sensor summary email (08:00 and 20:00).
Flow B: Watchdog — alerts if no data arrives for 1 hour.
Both send via Gmail. Configure credentials in the email node.

name: Query last readings
Format summary email
Check & alert
